channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Jagex' Biggest RuneFest Yet is Happening This Year, and Tickets Go on Sale Next Week
item.content:encoded:
This October, Jagex will be holding its biggest RuneFest event ever, and tickets are going on sale soon, on April 30th. The team released lots of info on the event, ticket details, pricing, merch, and more to know before the sales open. 

The event is happening October 3-4th in Birmingham, England. This is part of RS25, a huge year for Jagex and the RuneScape franchise, so they’re, unsurprisingly, going big.   This year's event will be their biggest ever, with double the capacity of the 2025 event, which means 6,000 players and more than 300 staff and creators. Because it's RS25, the team is teasing a surprise 25th anniversary themed opening ceremony and new entertainment to look forward to.

Tickets to last year's event sold out in minutes, so it's not surprising that not only did they increase capacity, they doubled it. They've also booked their first US-based event this year.

There will be two permanent stages with panels that feature JMods and creators,  as well as behind the scenes content to check out. The main stage is where you will catch the classic RuneFest content, like roadmap reveals for RuneScape, Old School RuneScape, and the (newly one-year old) RuneScape: Dragonwilds. The Golden Gnome community and creator awards will also happen here. If you can't make it in person, you can catch it all on the event livestream.

But if you can make it in person, there will be two tiers of tickets going on sale next Thursday at 16:00 BST / 11am ET /8am PT/17:00 CEST. The standard ticket will let you into the full event both days, and  send you home with a goodie bag. The new Gold tier features additional benefits, like reserved seating, a merch discount and early access to that merch, and priority booking for meet and greets. Gold tier goodie bags also get an exclusive RuneFest Gold Trim Rune Armour Figurine by Youtooz that will never be made again. 

For that merch, there are pre-order items that will be available when the tickets go on sale, including personalized t-shirts, and other collectibles that you can pick up at the event.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/jagex-biggest-runefest-yet-is-happening-this-year-and-tickets-go-on-sale-next-week-2000137871
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
